title: Launch Board
brief: Organize release tasks by workflow status and move work forward from planning to completion.
audience: A release lead tracking delivery work across the team at the start of the day.
scope: A four-column release board over local seed cards
Drag-and-drop and button moves that change a card's workflow column
Search and per-column filtering, plus adding a local work item
Full CRUD on work items: create, edit (title, description, priority, column), and delete via a manage-items panel
Board state persisted to the browser's localStorage across reloads, with a Reset board action that restores the seed
boundaries: No project-tracking service, workflow permissions, or backend persistence is connected
Card moves, edits, deletions, and additions are saved to this browser's localStorage only, not to any server
The seed cards are illustrative and do not represent a live release
Creating or editing a work item requires a non-empty title
